organization.name: NayePankh Foundation
organization.mission: Empower underserved communities through education, awareness, volunteer action, and social impact programs.
organization.vision: A society where every child and family can access opportunity, dignity, and support.

programs.title: Education Support
programs.answer: We run educational initiatives, tutoring support, and school supply drives.

programs.title: Awareness Campaigns
programs.answer: We create awareness campaigns for health, education, environment, and community well-being.

programs.title: Volunteer Activities
programs.answer: Volunteers support field work, content, outreach, planning, and community engagement.

programs.title: Donation Support
programs.answer: Donations help us run programs, support campaigns, and expand our community impact.

faq.a: Share your skills, interests, and available hours in the Volunteer Recommender to get matched with a role.
Use the donation appeal generator or contact the foundation through its official channels to support a cause.
Communication, content writing, coordination, design, teaching, and outreach are especially useful.
Events can include donation drives, awareness programs, school activities, volunteer drives, and campaigns.
NayePankh Foundation is an NGO focused on awareness, education, volunteer engagement, and social impact programs.
